title: Simpsons Roasting on an Open Fire

dialogue_lines.text: - Hey, Norman, how's it goin'? So you got dragged down here too, huh? - How you doin', Fred? - Sorry.

dialogue_lines.text: Excuse me.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Yeah.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: 'Scuse me.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Oh! Pardon my galoshes.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Are met in thee tonight Wasn't that wonderful? And now "Santas of many lands," as presented by the entire second grade class.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Oh! Lisa's class.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Frohliche Weihnachten.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: That's German for " Merry Christmas.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: " In Germany, Santa's servant Ruprecht gives presents to good children and whipping rods to the parents of bad ones.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Merry Kurisumasu.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: I am Hotseiosha, a japanese priest who acts like Santa Claus.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: I have eyes in the back ofmy head so children better behave when I'm nearby.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Now presenting Lisa Simpson as Tawanga, the Santa Claus of the South Seas.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Ooh, it's Lisa! That's ours.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Ah, the fourth grade will now favor us with a melody-- Uh, medley of holiday "flavorites.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: " Dashing through the snow In a one-horse open sleigh O'er the fields we go Laughing all the way Ha ha ha Bells on bobtail ring - Isn't Bart sweet, Homer? He sings like an angel.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Oh, jingle bells Batman smells Robin laid an egg The Batmobile broke its wheel The joker got awa-- Jingle bells Jingle bells Jingle all The fifth grade will now favour us with a scene from Charles, uh, Dickens' A Christmas Carol.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: How many grades does this school have? " Dear friends of the Simpson family, "We had some sadness and some gladness this year.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: " First, the sadness.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Our little cat Snowball "was unexpectedly run over and went to kitty heaven.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: "But we bought a new little cat, Snowball I.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: "So I guess life goes on.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: "Speaking of life going on, Grandpa's still with us, feisty as ever.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: " Maggie is walking by herself, "Lisa got straight A's, and Bart-- "Well, we love Bart.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: "The magic of the season has touched us all.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Marge, haven't you finished that stupid letter yet? - " Homer sends his love.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Happy holidays.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Marge! - The Simpsons.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: " - Marge, where's the extension cord? For heaven's sake, Homer.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: It's in the utility drawer.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Sorry.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: I'm just a big kid.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: And I love Christmas so much.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: D'oh! All right, children, let me have those letters.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: I'll send them to Santa's workshop at the North Pole.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Oh, please.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: There's only one fat guy that brings us presents, and his name ain't Santa.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Uh-- A pony? Oh, Lisa, you've asked for that for the last three years, and I keep telling you Santa can't fit a pony into his sleigh.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Can't you take a hint? But I really want a pony, - and I've been really good this year.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Oh, dear.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Maybe Bart is a little more realistic.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - A tattoo? - A what? Yeah! They're cool, and they last the rest of your life.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: you will not be getting a tattoo for Christmas.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Yeah.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: If you want one, you'll have to pay for it out of your allowance.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - All right! - Homer! - "Yello.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: " - Marge, please.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Who's this? May I please speak to Marge? - This is her sister, isn't it? - Is Marge there? - Who shall I say is calling? - Marge, please.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: It's your sister.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Oh! - Hello.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Hello, Marge.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: It's Patty.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Selma and I couldn't be more excited about seeing our sister Christmas Eve.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Well, Homer and I are looking forward to your visit too.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Somehow I doubt that Homer is excited.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: of all the men you could've married, I don't know why you picked one who's always so rude to us.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Good one, Dad.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Okay, kids, prepare to be dazzled.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Marge, turn on the juice! - What do you think, kids? - Nice try, Dad.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Just hold your horses, son.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Hey, Simpson! - What is it, Flanders? - Do you think this looks okay? Ho ho ho.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Ho ho ho.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Oh! - Oh, neato! It's too bright.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: I oughta-- Flanders.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: What a big show-off.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Kids, wanna go Christmas shopping? - I do! - All right! The mall! - Go get your money.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Tell us, Marge.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Where have you been hiding the Christmas money? Oh, I have my secrets.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Turn around.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - you can look now.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Ooh! Big jar this year.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Oh, Bart, that's so sweet.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: It's the best present a mother could get, and it makes you look so dangerous.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - One " Mother," please.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Wait a minute.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: How old are you? - Twenty-one, sir.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Get in the chair.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Mm-hmm.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Mm-hmm.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Mm-hmm.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Mm-hmm.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Mm-hmm.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Attention, all personnel, please keep working during the following announcement.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: And now our boss and friend Mr.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Burns.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Hello.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: I'm proud to announce that we've been able to increase safety here at the plant without increasing the cost to the consumer or affecting management payraises.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: However, for you semiskilled workers, there will be no Christmas bonuses.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Oh, and one more thing.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Merry Christmas! - Oh, thank God for the big jar.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Where's that Bart? But, Mom, I thought you'd like it.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Yes, Mrs.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Simpson, we can remove your son's tattoo.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: It's a simple routine involving lasers.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Cool! - However, it is rather expensive, and we must insist on a cash payment up front.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Cash? - Mm-hmm.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Thank God for Homer's Christmas bonus.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Ay, caramba! - Now, whatever you do, don't squirm.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: you don't wanna get this sucker near your eye or your groin.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Ow! Quit it.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Ow! Quit it.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Ow! Quit it.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Ow! Quit it.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Hey, what's with this? Ow! Quit it! Used to be a real boss tattoo.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Mom had to spend the Christmas money having it surgically removed.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Huh? It's true! The jar is empty! Oh, my God! We're ruined.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Christmas is canceled.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: No presents for anyone! Don't worry, Homer.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: We'll just have to stretch your Christmas bonus - even further this year.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Homer? - Oh, yeah.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: My Christmas bonus.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: How silly of me.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: This'll be the best Christmas yet.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: The best any family ever had.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Hohoho.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Hohoho.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Hohoho.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Ho ho ho.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Hohoho.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Hmm.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: I get the feeling there's something you haven't told me, Homer.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Huh? Oh.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: I love you, Marge.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - you tell me that all the time.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Oh, good, because I do love you.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: I don't deserve you as much as a guy with a fat wallet and a credit card that won't set off that horrible beeping.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: I think it does have something to do with your Christmas bonus.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: I keep asking for it, but-- Marge, um, let me be honest with you.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Yes? - Well, I would-- I-- I wanna do the Christmas shopping this year.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Uh, sure, okay.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Marge, Marge.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Hmm.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Let'ssee.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Ooh, look! Pantyhose.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Practical and alluring.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: A six-pack.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Oh! Only 4.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Ooh! Pads of paper.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: I bet Bart can think of a million things to do with these.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: That just leaves little Maggie.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Oh, look! A little squeak toy.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: It says it's for dogs, but she can't read.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Ow! Oh, Simpson, it's you.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Hello, Flanders.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Oh, my! What a mess we've got here.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Well, which ones are yours and which ones are mine? - Well, let's see.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Oh, this one's mine.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: This one's mine.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - This one's mine, and this-- - They're all yours! - Hey, you dropped your pork chop.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Gimme that! - Well, happy holidays, Simpson.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Gee, this is the best Christmas ever.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - You bet.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: What's the matter, Homer? Somebody leave a lump of coal in your stocking? You've been sitting there, sucking on a beer all day long.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - So? - So, it's Christmas.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Thanks, Moe.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Drinks all around! What's with the crazy getup, Barn? I got me a part-timejob working as a Santa down at the mall.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Wow! Can I do that? I don't know.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: They're pretty selective.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Do you like children? What do you mean? All the time? Even when they're nuts? - Hmm.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Uh, I certainly do.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Welcome aboard, Simpson.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Pending your successful completion of our training program, that is.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Ho ho ho.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Ho ho ho.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Ho ho ho.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Ho ho ho.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - What is it now, Simpson? - Uh, when do we get paid? Not a dime till Christmas Eve! Now, from the top.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Ho ho ho.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Ho ho ho.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Um, Dasher.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Dancer.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Mm-hmm.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Prancer.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Mm-hmm.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Nixon.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Comet and Cupid.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Donna Dixon? - Sit down, Simpson.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: And what would you like, little boy? - You're not really Santa, tubby.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Why, you little egghead! No, Homer! If such an emergency arises, you just tell them Santa's vey busy this time of year, - and you are one of his helpers.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Oh, I knew that one too! Homer, why are you seven hours late? Not a word, Marge.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: I'm heading straight for the tub.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: But, Homer, my sisters are here.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Don't you wanna say hello? - Daddy! We're so glad to see you! - Oh, Dad, you're finally home! What? Why? Oh, yeah.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Hello, Patty.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Hello, Selma.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - How was your trip? - Fine.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - you both look well.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Thank you.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Yeah, well, Merry Christmas.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - It's Christmas? - you wouldn't know it around here.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - And why is that? - For one thing, there's no tree - I was just on my way out to get one! - Can we go too, Dad? - Yeah, can we? No! Sleighbells ring Are you listening In the lane Snow is glistening A beautiful sight We're happy tonight - Walking in a winter wonderland Hey! What do you think you're doin'? - Uh-oh.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Hey! Hey! - Come back here! So what do you think, kids? Beauty, isn't it? - Wow! Yay, Dad! - Way to go, Dad! - Why is there a birdhouse in it? - Uh, that's an ornament.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Do I smell gunpowder? and then I want some Robotoids.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: And then I want a Goop Monster.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: And then I want a great big, giant-- Aw, son, you don't need all that junk.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: I'm sure you've already got something much more important-- a decent home and a loving father who would do anything for you.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Hey, I couldn't afford lunch.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Give me a bite of that donut.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Get a load of that quote-unquote Santa.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: I can't believe those kids are falling for it.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Hey, Milhouse, I dare you to sit on his lap.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - I dare you to yank his beard off.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Ah, touche.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: I hope you feel better, Santa.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Oh, I will when Mrs.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Claus' sisters get outta town.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Thanks for listenin', kid.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Hey, Santa, what's shakin', man? What's your name, Bart ner? Uh, little partner? - I'm Bart Simpson.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Who are you? - I'm jolly Old St.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Nick.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Oh, yeah? We'll just see about that.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: D'oh! - Homer! - A word with you in Santa's workshop.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Cover for me, Elfie.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - I didn't know it was you.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Nobody knows.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: It's a secret.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: I didn't get my bonus this year.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: But to keep the family from missing out on Christmas, - I'd do anything.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - I'll say, Dad.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: you must really love us to sink so low.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Now, let's not get mushy, son.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: I still have a job to do.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Hey, little ones.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Santa's back.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Ho ho-- D'oh! Damn it to-- Ah, son, one day you're gonna know the satisfaction of payday.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Receiving a big fat check for a job well done.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Simpson, Homer? Here ya go.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Come on, son.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Let's go cash this baby and get presents for-- Thirteen bucks? Hey, wait a minute.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: That's right.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: $120 gross.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Less Social Security, less unemployment insurance, - less Santa training - Santa training? less costume purchase, less beard rental, less Christmas club.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - But-- But-- - See ya next year.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Ohh! - Come on, Dad.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Let's go home.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Thirteen bucks? you can't get anything for 13 bucks.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Allright! Thirteen bigones! Springfield Downs, here I come! - What? - you heard me.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: I'm goin' to the dog track.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: I got a hot little puppy in the fourth race.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Wanna come? - Sory, Barney.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: I may be a total washout as a father, but I'm not gonna take my kid to a sleazy dog track on Christmas Eve.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Come on, Simpson.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: The dog's name is Whirlwind.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Ten-to-one shot.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Money in the bank.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Uh-uh.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Ah, come on, Dad.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: This can be the miracle that saves the Simpsons' Christmas.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: If TV has taught me anything, it's that miracles always happen to poor kids at Christmas.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: It happened to Tiny Tim, it happened to Charlie Brown, it happened to the Smurfs and it's gonna happen to us.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Well, okay, let's go.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Who's Tiny Tim? Hey, Moldy, do you think Santa will be able to find ElfCounty under all this snow? I doubt it, Bubbles.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: We'll be sad little elves this Christmas.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Oh, no! - Oh, brother.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Where's your husband? - Yeah.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: It's getting late.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Said he went caroling with Bart.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: We're in the money, we're in the money We got a lot of what it takes to get along I can't believe I'm doing this.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Can we open our presents now, Dad? you know the tradition, son.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Not till the eighth race.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Hey, Barney, which one is Whirlwind? Number Six.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: That's our lucky dog right over there.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: He's won his last five races.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: What? That scrawny little bag of bones? Come on, Dad.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: They're all scrawny little bags of bones.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Yeah, you're right.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: I guess Whirlwind is our only hope for a Merry Christmas.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Attention, racing fans, we have a late scratch in the fourth race.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Number 8, Sir Galahad will be replaced by Santa's Little Helper.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Once again, Sir Galahad has been replaced by Santa's Little Helper.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Bart, did you hear that? What a name! Santa's Little Helper! - It's a sign! It's an omen! - It's a coincidence, Dad.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - What are the odds on Santa's Little Helper? - Ninety-nine to one.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Wow! Ninety-nine times thirteen equals Merry Christmas! I got a bad feeling about this.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Don't you believe in me, son? - Uh-- Come on, boy.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Sometimes your faith is all that keeps me going.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Oh, go for it, Dad.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: That's my boy! Eveything on Santa's Little Helper.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Three cheers for Brainy! - Hip hip hooray! - Yay! Unadulterated pap.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: It's almost 9:00.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Where's Homer anyway? It's so typical of the big doof us to spoil it all.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - What, Aunt Patty? - Oh, nothing, dear.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: I'm just trashing your father.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Well, I wish you wouldn't because aside from the fact he has the same frailties as all human belings.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: he's the only father I have.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Therefore, he is my model of manhood, and my estimation of him will govern the prospects of my adult relationships.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: So I hope you bear in mind that any knock at him is a knock at me, and I'm far too young to defend myself against such onslaughts.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Mm-hmm.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Go watch your cartoon show, dear.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Come on, Bart.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Kiss the ticket for good luck, not that we need it.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Here comes Screwy the mechanical rabbit.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - and they're off! - Come on, Santa's Little Helper! - Come on, dog! Go, man, go! It's Whirlwind in the lane, and coming up on the left is Quadruped, followed by Dog O'War and Fido.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Go! Come on, boy! - Go! Come on, get that rabbit! Dog O'War coming up fast on the outside.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Come on, Santa's Little Helper! - Come on, dog! Go, man, go! And with a lock on last place, it's Santa's Little Helper.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Don't worry, Dad.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Maybe this is just for suspense before the miracle happens.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Come on, you stupid dog! Come on! - Go, go! - Run! Run! - Run, run! Come on, get that rabbit! - Go, go, Santa's Little Helper! Run! - Go, go, go! Whirlwind by a countrymile, second, ChewMyShoe, followed by Dog O'War.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Oh, jeez! Doesn't seem possible, but I guess TV has betrayed me.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: I don't wanna leave till our dog finishes.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Ah, forget it.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Let's go.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Find any winners, son? - Sory, Dad.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Hey, hey, Simpson! What'dl tell you? Whirlwind! Let's go, Daria.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Beat it! Scram! Get lost! - you came in last for the last time! Look, Dad, it's Santa's Little Helper.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: And don't come back! Oh, no, you don't! No, no! Get away from me! Uh-uh! Oh, can we keep him, Dad, please? But he's a loser! He's pathetic! He's-- A Simpson.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Hmm.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Maybe I should call the police.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Oh, he'll sober up.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Yeah.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Come staggering home.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Mm-hmm.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Smelling of cheap perfume.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - Homer! - What? What the-- Who the-- - Look, eveybody, - I have a confession to make.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - This should be good.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: I didn't get my Christmas bonus.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: I tried not to let it ruin Christmas for eveybody, but no matter what I did-- - Hey, eveybody, lookwhat we got! A dog! All right, Dad! - God bless him.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - So love at first sight is possible.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: And if he runs away, he'll be easy to catch.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Oh, this is the best gift of all, Homer! - It is? - Yes.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Something to share our love and frighten prowlers.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: - What's his name? - Number 8-- I mean, Santa's Little Helper.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Rudolph the red-nosed reindeer Had a very shiny nose And if you ever saw it - you would even say it glows - Like a light bulb! -Bart! - All of the other reindeer Used to laugh and call him names - Like Shnozzola! -Lisa! They never let poor Rudolph - Join in any reindeergames -Like strippoker! -I'm warning you two! - Then one foggy Christmas Eve - Santa came to say - Take it, Homer! Uh, Rudolph get your nose over here - So you can guide my sleigh today - Oh, Homer.

dialogue_lines.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue_lines.text: Then all the reindeer loved him and they shouted out with glee Rudolph the red-nosed reindeer You'll go down in history -Like Attila the Hu-- - You little-- Shh.
